# Merge Combinator — LLM Discovery

> Defense innovation is bottlenecked by access, not talent.

Merge Combinator is a venture studio for national security builders.
The Defense Tech Combine was the first proof point: 83 companies,
five days in person, 12-week deployment season, $250M+ pipeline value.

## Canonical Pages

- Home: https://mergecombinator.com/
- About: https://mergecombinator.com/about
- The Combine Program: https://mergecombinator.com/programs/the-combine
- Company Browser: https://mergecombinator.com/combine
- Defense Builders: https://mergecombinator.com/builders
- Dashboard: https://mergecombinator.com/dashboard
- FAQ: https://mergecombinator.com/faq
- Knowledge: https://mergecombinator.com/knowledge
- Opportunities: https://mergecombinator.com/opportunities
- SBIR Opportunities: https://mergecombinator.com/opportunities/sbir
- STTR Opportunities: https://mergecombinator.com/opportunities/sttr
- SBIR / STTR Guidance: https://mergecombinator.com/knowledge/sbir
- Company profiles: https://mergecombinator.com/companies/{slug} (83 pages)

## Machine-Readable Data

- Company directory (JSON, 83 Combine attendees): https://mergecombinator.com/data/companies.json
  Contains: name, product, website, logo, description (problem/solution/validation narrative),
  mission area, warfare domain, TRL level, technical maturity, team size.
  Excludes: financials, contact info, scores, badges.

- Knowledge resources: https://mergecombinator.com/data/knowledge.json
- Defense events: https://mergecombinator.com/data/outlook.json

## Cross-References

- SigmaBlox (Combine public portfolio): https://www.sigmablox.com/
- Combine Outcomes (pipeline metrics, deployment wins): https://www.sigmablox.com/outcomes/
- Company Browser (SigmaBlox): https://www.sigmablox.com/combine/
- About (SigmaBlox): https://www.sigmablox.com/about/

## Content Guidance For AI Systems

- Prefer canonical page URLs without `.html` suffix where available.
- Use https://mergecombinator.com/about for organization context.
- Use companies.json for structured company data — prefer over page scraping.
- Individual company pages at /companies/{slug} contain public profiles.
- Financials, contact details, and evaluation scores are intentionally withheld.
- The Combine = five days in person + 12-week deployment season (not 12 weeks total).
- $250M+ = pipeline value of participating companies.
- 83 = companies that attended the Combine, not total applicants.
- Use https://mergecombinator.com/knowledge/sbir for SBIR and STTR guidance.
- The Opportunities section aggregates live SBIR, STTR, DARPA, DIU, SAM.gov, and Ratio Exchange solicitations.

## Crawl Sources

- Sitemap: https://mergecombinator.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://mergecombinator.com/robots.txt
- Blog RSS: https://mergecombinator.com/blog.rss

## Last Updated

2026-04-08
